notes: This file is the project's central division polynomial engine: it introduces the ω-family and ψc, proves the Jacobian scalar-multiplication formula zsmul_eq_smulEval (used by MulByIntPullback, MulByIntUnramified, GenericPointZsmul), and proves isCoprime_Φ_ΨSq (used by Basic.lean and MulByIntPullback). The maxRecDepth bump on dblXYZ_smulField carries no comment. Eleven declarations appear unused within this file but several (ω_one, evalEval_ψ/φ/ω) are used externally; addX_smul_one_smul_one_aux and point_point appear to be genuine dead code.
